message:
ci(test262): enable parallel execution for fair comparison

All engines now run with --threads=3 to fairly compare execution speed
on GitHub Actions macos-latest (3 cores).

Before (sequential):
- EdgeBox: 138s (fast startup, ~5.8ms per test)
- QuickJS: 153s (fast startup, ~6.4ms per test)
- Node.js: 771s (slow startup, ~32ms per test)
- Bun: 387s (medium startup, ~16ms per test)

Expected after (parallel with 3 threads):
- EdgeBox: ~50-60s (less benefit, already fast)
- QuickJS: ~55-65s (less benefit, already fast)
- Node.js: ~250-280s (3x faster, high startup overhead)
- Bun: ~130-150s (3x faster, medium startup overhead)

This gives a fairer comparison by amortizing process startup costs
across multiple parallel workers. The per-test execution time difference
(5ms vs 30ms) is less about JS performance and more about binary size
and initialization overhead.

files.patch:
@@ -73,6 +73,7 @@ jobs:
           START=$(date +%s)
           ./zig-out/bin/edgebox-test262 \
             --engine=edgebox \
+            --threads=3 \
             --harness=vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/harness \
             vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/test/language/ \
             > results-edgebox.txt 2>&1 || true
@@ -84,6 +85,7 @@ jobs:
           START=$(date +%s)
           ./zig-out/bin/edgebox-test262 \
             --engine=qjs \
+            --threads=3 \
             --harness=vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/harness \
             vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/test/language/ \
             > results-qjs.txt 2>&1 || true
@@ -95,6 +97,7 @@ jobs:
           START=$(date +%s)
           ./zig-out/bin/edgebox-test262 \
             --engine=node \
+            --threads=3 \
             --harness=vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/harness \
             vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/test/language/ \
             > results-node.txt 2>&1 || true
@@ -106,6 +109,7 @@ jobs:
           START=$(date +%s)
           ./zig-out/bin/edgebox-test262 \
             --engine=bun \
+            --threads=3 \
             --harness=vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/harness \
             vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/test/language/ \
             > results-bun.txt 2>&1 || true
@@ -122,6 +126,8 @@ jobs:
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "Using \`vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/test/language/\` for fair comparison across engines." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "**Test execution:** Parallel mode with 3 threads for fair comparison (GitHub Actions macos-latest has 3 cores)." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
           echo "## Execution Time" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
